portun normalize_fixture_path(raw_path: str) -> str: 
 """Normalize a repo-relative path coming from mixed slash inputs."""
 prefix = "" 
 if raw_path.startswith("./"): 
 prefix = "./" 
 raw_path = raw_path[2:] 
 elif raw_path.startswith("/"): 
 prefix = "/" 
 raw_path = raw_path[1:] 
 normalized = raw_path.replace("\\", "/") 
 while "//" in normalized:
